Items.Title: 有效的宣传是什么样的？ | What does effective advocacy look like?
Items.Description:
开发团队的Erin Bensinger

发表于 3 月 10 日

处于边缘地位的人对倡导的概念并不陌生。 我们为自己、为彼此、为我们的工作、为我们的社区提倡——有时是同时提倡。 这很累，对吧？

这就是为什么我们也期待盟友（没有因为种族或性别等特定身份而被边缘化的同事、同事和朋友）为我们和与我们一起倡导。 然而，有时盟友会被难住：当他们不知道如何最好地为我们辩护时，他们会僵住并保持沉默，从而让现状继续下去。

那么让我们来谈谈吧。

工作场所的有效宣传是什么样的？

随时分享想法、生活经验、问题和疑虑。 在此对话中欢迎您所有交叉的身份！

当然，在我们讨论时提醒您遵守行为准则。 我保证会迅速而细致地主持讨论。 如果您知道关于此主题的另一篇好文章，请将其放在评论中！

原文:

Erin Bensinger for The DEV Team

Posted on Mar 10

   

People of marginalized identities are no strangers to the concept of advocacy. We advocate for ourselves, for each other, for our work, for our community — sometimes all at once. It's exhausting, right?

This is why we also look to allies (coworkers, colleagues, and friends who are not marginalized based on a particular identity, such as race or gender) to advocate for us and with us. And yet, sometimes allies get stumped: when they don't know how best to advocate for us, they freeze up and remain silent, which allows the status quo to continue.

So let's talk about it.

What does effective advocacy in the workplace look like?

Feel free to share ideas, lived experiences, questions, and concerns. All your intersecting identities are welcome in this conversation!

And, of course, a reminder to abide by the Code of Conduct while we discuss. I promise to moderate the discussion swiftly and with nuance. ❤️

@abbeyperini wrote an awesome article with some great, actionable ideas for advocating for women in the workplace specifically:

If you know of another good article on this topic, please drop it in the comments!

Items.Description:
发表于 3 月 10 日

为了纪念#wecoded，我们想强调一些我们发现到目前为止对我们标签下的人特别有用的资源。 我们感谢你们所有人参与讲述你们第一次开始编码时的情况，以及我们如何继续推动技术的多样性、公平和包容性的障碍。

Items.Description:
将聊天机器人集成到您的 iOS 版 WhatsApp 中是自动化您的消息传递任务并为您的用户提供更好体验的好方法。 等待！ 如果您喜欢阅读此博客，请点赞、评论和分享，如果您需要更详细的指南，请随时与我联系！

在此博客中，我将介绍将 ChatGPT 集成到 iOS 上的 WhatsApp 的步骤，以及一些示例代码。

第 1 步：创建 ChatGPT 帐户

第一步是创建一个 ChatGPT 帐户。 您可以通过访问 ChatGPT 网站并注册一个帐户来完成此操作。 注册后，您需要通过选择“New Bot”选项来创建一个新的聊天机器人。

第 2 步：获取您的 ChatGPT API 密钥

创建新聊天机器人后，您需要获取 ChatGPT API 密钥。 此密钥将允许您访问 ChatGPT API 并向聊天机器人发送请求。 您可以在 ChatGPT 帐户的设置部分找到您的 API 密钥。

第 3 步：创建 WhatsApp Business 帐户

在将 ChatGPT 集成到 iOS 版 WhatsApp 之前，您需要创建一个 WhatsApp Business 帐户。 此帐户将允许您创建 WhatsApp Business API 客户端并将其连接到您的聊天机器人。

第 4 步：创建 WhatsApp Business API 客户端

创建 WhatsApp Business 帐户后，您需要创建一个 WhatsApp Business API 客户端。 此客户端将允许您将聊天机器人连接到 iOS 上的 WhatsApp。 要创建 WhatsApp Business API 客户端，请按照以下步骤操作：

  • 前往 Facebook 商务管理平台。
  • 选择“添加”按钮并选择“WhatsApp Business API”。
  • 按照提示创建您的 WhatsApp Business API 客户端。

第 5 步：将您的 ChatGPT 聊天机器人连接到您的 WhatsApp Business API 客户端

现在您已经创建了 WhatsApp Business API 客户端，您可以将它连接到您的 ChatGPT 聊天机器人。 为此，您需要使用 ChatGPT API 向您的 WhatsApp Business API 客户端发送消息。 下面是一些示例代码，可帮助您入门：

 import requests import json # Set the API endpoint endpoint = 'https://api.chatgpt.com/v1/' # Set your ChatGPT API key api_key = 'your_api_key_here' # Set the WhatsApp Business API client ID and phone number client_id = 'your_client_id_here' phone_number = 'your_phone_number_here' # Set the message you want to send message = 'Hello, this is your ChatGPT chatbot!' # Set the payload payload = { 'client_id': client_id, 'phone_number': phone_number, 'message': message } # Set the headers headers = { 'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } # Send the message response = requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/send', headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload)) # Print the response print(response.json())

此代码将使用 ChatGPT API 向您的 WhatsApp Business API 客户端发送一条消息。

第 6 步：处理传入消息

将 ChatGPT 聊天机器人连接到 WhatsApp Business API 客户端后，您将需要处理传入的消息。 为此，您需要使用 WhatsApp Business API 接收来自用户的消息，然后使用 ChatGPT API 生成响应。 下面是一些示例代码，可帮助您入门：

 import requests import json # Set the API endpoint endpoint = 'https://api.chatgpt.com/v1/' # Set your ChatGPT API key api_key = 'your_api_key_here' # Set the WhatsApp Business API client ID and phone number client_id = 'your_client_id_here' phone_number = 'your_phone_number_here' # Set the webhook URL for incoming messages webhook_url = 'your_webhook_url_here' # Set the headers for the webhook request webhook_headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } # Create a function to handle incoming messages def handle_message(message): # Use the ChatGPT API to generate a response response = requests.post(endpoint + 'chatbot', headers=headers, data=json.dumps({'message': message})) # Extract the response from the JSON data chatbot_response = response.json()['response'] # Send the response back to the user using the WhatsApp Business API payload = { 'client_id': client_id, 'phone_number': phone_number, 'message': chatbot_response } requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/send', headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload)) # Set up a webhook to receive incoming messages def setup_webhook(): # Set the payload for the webhook request payload = { 'webhook_url': webhook_url, 'event_types': ['MESSAGE'] } # Send the webhook request response = requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/webhook', headers=webhook_headers, data=json.dumps(payload)) # Print the response print(response.json()) # Call the setup_webhook() function to set up the webhook setup_webhook() # Handle incoming messages using the handle_message() function @app.route('/webhook', methods=['POST']) def webhook(): message = request.json['payload']['message']['text'] handle_message(message) return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})

此代码设置一个网络钩子来接收来自用户的传入消息，然后使用 ChatGPT API 生成响应并使用 WhatsApp Business API 将其发回给用户。

最后的话！

总之，将 ChatGPT 集成到 iOS 上的 WhatsApp 中可以极大地改善您的消息传递体验并自动化您的消息传递任务。 按照本博客中概述的步骤，您可以轻松地将 ChatGPT 聊天机器人连接到 WhatsApp Business API 客户端并处理来自用户的传入消息。

等等！ 这些只是基本步骤，可以帮助您的初学者，例如初级开发人员的项目！ 但是，如果您从事复杂的项目，那么您应该联系一家优秀且值得信赖的Android 应用程序开发或iOS 应用程序开发公司。



原文:

Integrating a chatbot into your WhatsApp on iOS is a great way to automate your messaging tasks and provide your users with a better experience. ChatGPT is a large language model trained by OpenAI that can help you create a chatbot that can handle natural language processing tasks.

Wait! If you like reading this blog, please like, comment and share and also if you want more detailed guide, feel free to reach me!

In this blog, I will go over the steps to integrate ChatGPT into WhatsApp on iOS, along with some sample codes.

Step 1: Create a ChatGPT account

The first step is to create a ChatGPT account. You can do this by visiting the ChatGPT website and signing up for an account. Once you have signed up, you will need to create a new chatbot by selecting the "New Bot" option.

Step 2: Get your ChatGPT API key

Once you have created a new chatbot, you will need to get your ChatGPT API key. This key will allow you to access the ChatGPT API and send requests to the chatbot. You can find your API key in the settings section of your ChatGPT account.

Step 3: Create a WhatsApp Business account

Before you can integrate ChatGPT into WhatsApp on iOS, you will need to create a WhatsApp Business account. This account will allow you to create a WhatsApp Business API client and connect it to your chatbot.

Step 4: Create a WhatsApp Business API client

Once you have created your WhatsApp Business account, you will need to create a WhatsApp Business API client. This client will allow you to connect your chatbot to WhatsApp on iOS. To create a WhatsApp Business API client, follow these steps:

  • Go to the Facebook Business Manager.
  • Select the "Add" button and choose "WhatsApp Business API".
  • Follow the prompts to create your WhatsApp Business API client.

Step 5: Connect your ChatGPT chatbot to your WhatsApp Business API client

Now that you have created your WhatsApp Business API client, you can connect it to your ChatGPT chatbot. To do this, you will need to use the ChatGPT API to send messages to your WhatsApp Business API client. Here's some sample code to get you started:

import requests
import json

# Set the API endpoint
endpoint = 'https://api.chatgpt.com/v1/'

# Set your ChatGPT API key
api_key = 'your_api_key_here'

# Set the WhatsApp Business API client ID and phone number
client_id = 'your_client_id_here'
phone_number = 'your_phone_number_here'

# Set the message you want to send
message = 'Hello, this is your ChatGPT chatbot!'

# Set the payload
payload = {
    'client_id': client_id,
    'phone_number': phone_number,
    'message': message
}

# Set the headers
headers = {
    'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}

# Send the message
response = requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/send', headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload))

# Print the response
print(response.json())

This code will send a message to your WhatsApp Business API client using the ChatGPT API.

Step 6: Handle incoming messages

Once you have connected your ChatGPT chatbot to your WhatsApp Business API client, you will need to handle incoming messages. To do this, you will need to use the WhatsApp Business API to receive messages from your users and then use the ChatGPT API to generate a response. Here's some sample code to get you started:

import requests
import json

# Set the API endpoint
endpoint = 'https://api.chatgpt.com/v1/'

# Set your ChatGPT API key
api_key = 'your_api_key_here'

# Set the WhatsApp Business API client ID and phone number
client_id = 'your_client_id_here'
phone_number = 'your_phone_number_here'

# Set the webhook URL for incoming messages
webhook_url = 'your_webhook_url_here'

# Set the headers for the webhook request
webhook_headers = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}

# Create a function to handle incoming messages
def handle_message(message):
    # Use the ChatGPT API to generate a response
    response = requests.post(endpoint + 'chatbot', headers=headers, data=json.dumps({'message': message}))
    # Extract the response from the JSON data
    chatbot_response = response.json()['response']
    # Send the response back to the user using the WhatsApp Business API
    payload = {
        'client_id': client_id,
        'phone_number': phone_number,
        'message': chatbot_response
    }
    requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/send', headers=headers, data=json.dumps(payload))

# Set up a webhook to receive incoming messages
def setup_webhook():
    # Set the payload for the webhook request
    payload = {
        'webhook_url': webhook_url,
        'event_types': ['MESSAGE']
    }
    # Send the webhook request
    response = requests.post(endpoint + 'whatsapp/webhook', headers=webhook_headers, data=json.dumps(payload))
    # Print the response
    print(response.json())

# Call the setup_webhook() function to set up the webhook
setup_webhook()

# Handle incoming messages using the handle_message() function
@app.route('/webhook', methods=['POST'])
def webhook():
    message = request.json['payload']['message']['text']
    handle_message(message)
    return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})

This code sets up a webhook to receive incoming messages from the user, then uses the ChatGPT API to generate a response and sends it back to the user using the WhatsApp Business API.

Final Words!!

In final words, integrating ChatGPT into WhatsApp on iOS can greatly improve your messaging experience and automate your messaging tasks. By following the steps outlined in this blog, you can easily connect your ChatGPT chatbot to your WhatsApp Business API client and handle incoming messages from your users.

Wait Wait! These are just basic steps and can help in your beginner like projects for junior developers! But, if you are into complex project then you should reach a good and trustable Android app development or iOS app development company.

Items.Title: 自托管 NodeJS ChatGPT Discord 机器人 | Selfhosted NodeJS ChatGPT Discord Bot
Items.Description:
该机器人通过config.json文件与OpenAI和Discord API集成。

该机器人要求用户拥有一个与 OpenAI 关联的支付账户，以记录数据使用情况。 数据是负担得起的，高级用户每天花费大约 10 美分，而普通用户甚至不到一分钱。 可通过 OpenAI API 进行节流管理，以帮助用户监控其使用情况。

一旦连接到 Discord，机器人就可以分配到一个特殊的频道，用户可以在其中与之互动。 用户可以输入/chat prompt在他们自己和 ChatGPT 或/chat prompt --public之间创建一个私人线程来打开一个公共的、协作的线程。 公共线程接受来自多方的协作输入，而私有线程只允许发起用户参与。

该机器人每个线程最多可记住 50 次交互，为 AI 提供对话的上下文良好视图。 用户可以在代码库中手动调整要记住的回复数量以控制费用。

但是，用户仍然可以将此机器人模型视为其他 AI 支持的语言模型的起点。

自托管 NodeJS ChatGPT Discord Bot可供 GBTI 开发人员社区使用。 如需了解更多信息，请访问gbti.io/ 。

降低 gbti 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 gbti 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

   

GBTI Labs Announces Self-Hosted NodeJS ChatGPT Discord Bot for Developers

GBTI Labs, an private devops group and membership community, is proud to announce the release of its self-hosted NodeJS ChatGPT Discord bot, designed to provide developers with a head start in integrating ChatGPT and other similar language models into Discord chatbots.

This bot integrates with both the OpenAI and Discord API through a config.json file.

The bot requires users to have a payment account linked with OpenAI to record data usage. The data is affordable, with a power user costing about 10 cents a day and a regular user not even a cent. Throttle management is available through the OpenAI API to help users monitor their usage.

Once connected to Discord, the bot can be assigned to a special channel where users can interact with it. Users can type in /chat prompt to create a private thread between themselves and ChatGPT or /chat prompt --public to open a public, collaborative thread. Public threads accept collaborative input from multiple parties, while private threads only allow the initiating user to participate.

The bot remembers up to 50 interactions per thread, providing the AI with a well-contextualized view of the conversation. Users can manually adjust the number of replies to remember in the codebase to control expenses.

GBTI Labs encourages developers to ask questions about installation and improvement directly in the Discord.

GBTI Labs notes that while some powerful interpretations of a ChatGPT Discord bot exist, there is no official bot provided by OpenAI. However, users can still consider this bot model a starting point for other AI-powered language models.

The Self-hosted NodeJS ChatGPT Discord Bot is available to the GBTI developer community. For more information, visit gbti.io/.

Items.Title: 软件开发合同中应包含的前五项条款 | Top five clauses to include in your software development contract
Items.Description:
合同对于任何业务关系都是必不可少的，当涉及到软件开发时，它们尤其重要。 一份精心起草的合同有助于确保双方理解他们的责任和义务，并且它可以成为解决纠纷的宝贵工具。 在本文中，我们将讨论每个软件开发合同应包括的前五个条款。

工作范围条款
工作范围条款是软件开发合同中最重要的要素之一。 本条款概述了开发人员将提供的具体任务和可交付成果，以及必须遵守的任何截止日期。 它有助于确保双方对项目的期望达成一致，并对开发人员将交付的内容设定明确的期望。

付款条款
付款条款是软件开发合同的另一个基本要素。 本条款概述了项目的付款条款和条件，包括开发商将获得多少付款以及何时付款。 它还应包括因错过付款而产生的任何罚款或滞纳金。

知识产权条款
知识产权条款是任何软件开发合同的重要组成部分。 它概述了谁将拥有项目期间开发的软件的知识产权。 本条款还应包括对客户使用软件的任何限制或限制。

保密条款
保密条款是任何软件开发合同的重要组成部分。 它概述了双方的保密义务，并规定了保护项目期间共享的机密信息的条款和条件。

终止条款
终止条款概述了可以终止合同的情况。 它还应包括任何一方在终止时必须提供的任何通知期限。 如果项目未完成或一方未履行其义务，该条款有助于保护双方。

结论：
总之，一份精心起草的软件开发合同对于确保双方了解各自的责任和义务至关重要。 通过在合同中包含这五个最重要的条款，您可以帮助保护自己和您的企业，并确保您的项目取得成功。 请记住，安全总比后悔好，精心起草的合同可以帮助确保您的项目成功完成并且没有任何法律纠纷。

我们直观的平台允许用户轻松创建专业和定制的合同，以满足他们的独特需求。 通过消除昂贵的法律费用和咨询的需要，Contracter.ai 使个人和企业能够以具有成本效益的方式控制他们的法律协议。



原文:

Contracts are essential to any business relationship, and when it comes to software development, they are particularly crucial. A well-drafted contract helps to ensure that both parties understand their responsibilities and obligations, and it can be a valuable tool for resolving disputes should they arise. In this article, we will discuss the top five clauses that every software development contract should include.

Scope of Work Clause
The scope of work clause is one of the most important elements of a software development contract. This clause outlines the specific tasks and deliverables that the developer will provide, as well as any deadlines that must be met. It helps to ensure that both parties are on the same page about what is expected from the project and sets clear expectations for what the developer will deliver.

Payment Clause
The payment clause is another essential element of a software development contract. This clause outlines the payment terms and conditions for the project, including how much the developer will be paid and when payment is due. It should also include any penalties or late fees for missed payments.

Intellectual Property Clause
The intellectual property clause is a critical component of any software development contract. It outlines who will own the intellectual property rights to the software that is developed during the project. This clause should also include any restrictions or limitations on the use of the software by the client.

Confidentiality Clause
The confidentiality clause is a vital component of any software development contract. It outlines the confidentiality obligations of both parties and sets out the terms and conditions for protecting the confidential information that is shared during the project.

Termination Clause
The termination clause outlines the circumstances under which the contract can be terminated. It should also include any notice periods that must be provided by either party in the event of termination. This clause helps to protect both parties in the event that the project is not completed or that one party is not fulfilling their obligations.

Conclusion:
In conclusion, a well-drafted software development contract is essential to ensure that both parties understand their responsibilities and obligations. By including these top five clauses in your contract, you can help to protect yourself and your business, and ensure that your project is a success. Remember, it's always better to be safe than sorry, and a carefully drafted contract can help to ensure that your project is completed successfully and without any legal disputes.

Items.Description:
开发阿南德

发表于 3 月 11 日

人类智能对人工智能的终极挑战！

今天，我们将在有史以来最简单但最受欢迎的游戏之一：井字棋中见证人类与AI opponent之间的斗智斗勇。

井字游戏和人工智能

这是一款易于学习但难以精通的游戏。

然而，随着 AI（人工智能）的出现，即使是最熟练的人类玩家也可能会发现自己很难跟上他们的电子对手。

首先通过编写游戏代码与人类对手对战来获得经验非常重要。

相关文章：井字棋，人对人。

保持冷静编码开始....

网格框模式

可能的获胜模式

该代码定义了一个名为wining_pattern的列表，其中包含 Tic-Tac-Toe 游戏中所有可能获胜组合的子列表。

 wining_pattern = [ [1,2,3], [4,5,6], [7,8,9], [1,4,7], [2,5,8], [3,6,9], [1,5,9], [3,5,7] ]

变量初始化

这些变量用于跟踪游戏状态，包括棋盘上的哪些位置已被占据以及由谁占据。

 taken_moves = [] default_values = [' ' for i in range(9)] players_moves = { 'X_moves': [], 'O_moves': [] } players = ['X', 'O']

更新游戏状态

决胜负

根据已采取的步骤，记录在players_moves字典中， check_wining将决定获胜者。

 def check_wining(moves): for i in wining_pattern: if all(j in moves for j in i): return True return False

机器将如何播放

人工智能第一步

人工智能智能移动🤓

人工智能制胜法宝🏆

驱动程序代码 - 人工智能与人类

它在人类玩家 ( X ) 和计算机 ( O ) 之间玩游戏，使用预定义策略和随机性的组合来确定计算机的移动。

 step = 0 game_grid(default_values) while step < 9 and step >= 0: if step >= 4: print('Match tied!') break player = "X" try: move = int(input(player + " : ")) if move < 10 and move not in taken_moves: step += 1 update_game(move,player) winner = check_winning() if step > 1 else None if winner: print(winner, 'Won!') break elif step == 1: O_move = initial_move() else: O_move = winning_move() O_move = smart_move(players_moves['O_moves'], players_moves['X_moves']) if not O_move else O_move O_move = random_edge_move() if not O_move else O_move print("O (Python 🐍): ",O_move) player = "O" update_game(O_move, player) winner = check_winning() if step > 1 else None if winner: print(winner, 'Won!') break continue print("Invalid move! - either your move is too high or already taken.") except: print("Invalid move! - wrong input.")

Dev Anand

Posted on Mar 11

   

Ultimate challenge of human intelligence against artificial intelligence!

Today, we will witness a battle of wits between a human and an AI opponent in one of the simplest yet most beloved games of all time: Tic-Tac-Toe.

Tic-tac-toe and AI

Tic-Tac-Toe is a classic game that has been played by generations of children and adults alike. It's a game that is easy to learn, but difficult to master.

However, with the advent of AI (Artificial Intelligence), even the most skilled human players may find themselves struggling to keep up with their electronic counterparts.

It's important to first gain experience by coding the game to play against a human opponent.

Related Article: Tic-tac-toe, Human vs Human.

Keep calm coding begins....

Tic-tac-toe in Python

Grid box pattern

The game_grid(value) function takes a list value containing the current state of the Tic-Tac-Toe game board as input.

def game_grid(value): print("\n") print("\t____________________") print("\t| | | |") print("\t| {} | {} | {} |".format(value[0], value[1], value[2])) print('\t|______|______|_____|') print("\t| | | |") print("\t| {} | {} | {} |".format(value[3], value[4], value[5])) print('\t|______|______|_____|') print("\t| | | |") print("\t| {} | {} | {} |".format(value[6], value[7], value[8])) print('\t|______|______|_____|') print("\n")

Possible winning patterns

The code defines a list called wining_pattern which contains sub-lists of all the possible winning combinations in a Tic-Tac-Toe game.

wining_pattern = [ [1,2,3], [4,5,6], [7,8,9], [1,4,7], [2,5,8], [3,6,9], [1,5,9], [3,5,7] ]

Variables initialisation

These variables are used to keep track of the state of the game, including which positions on the board have been taken and by whom.

taken_moves = []
default_values = [' ' for i in range(9)]
players_moves = { 'X_moves': [], 'O_moves': []
}
players = ['X', 'O']

Update Game state

The update_game function updates the game state based on the player's move and returns a visual representation of the updated game board.

def update_game(move, player): taken_moves.append(move) players_moves[player + '_moves'].append(move) default_values[move - 1] = player return game_grid(default_values)

Decide winner

On the basis of taken steps, recorded inside players_moves dictionary, check_wining will decide the winner.

def check_wining(moves): for i in wining_pattern: if all(j in moves for j in i): return True return False

How machine will play

AI First move

The initial_move() used to determine the first move made by the machine when playing tic-tac-toe against a human player.

def initial_move(): #Acquire Center
 if 5 not in players_moves['X_moves']: return 5 #Acquire any corner
 return random.choice([1,3,7,9])

AI Smart move 🤓

The smart_move() tries to find the best possible move for the player by analyzing the current state of the game and searching for potential winning slots.

def smart_move(mine_move, opp_moves): next_move = [] for i in winning_pattern: if not [x for x in mine_move if x in i]: for j in i: if j not in opp_moves: next_move.append(j) if len(next_move) == 1: return next_move[0] next_move = [] return False

AI Winning move 🏆

The winning_move() checks if there is a possible winning move for the player and returns that move if there is, otherwise returns None.

def winning_move(): moves = smart_move(players_moves['X_moves'], players_moves['O_moves']) return moves if moves else None

AI Random Edge move

The random_edge_move() returns the first available edge slot on the board, starting from the top-left and moving clockwise, if there is one.

def random_edge_move(): for i in [2,4,6,8]: if i not in taken_moves: return i

Driver Code - AI vs Human

It plays a game between a human player (X) and the computer (O), using a combination of pre-defined strategies and randomness to determine the computer's moves.

step = 0
game_grid(default_values)
while step < 9 and step >= 0: if step >= 4: print('Match tied!') break player = "X" try: move = int(input(player + " : ")) if move < 10 and move not in taken_moves: step += 1 update_game(move,player) winner = check_winning() if step > 1 else None if winner: print(winner, 'Won!') break elif step == 1: O_move = initial_move() else: O_move = winning_move() O_move = smart_move(players_moves['O_moves'], players_moves['X_moves']) if not O_move else O_move O_move = random_edge_move() if not O_move else O_move print("O (Python 🐍): ",O_move) player = "O" update_game(O_move, player) winner = check_winning() if step > 1 else None if winner: print(winner, 'Won!') break continue print("Invalid move! - either your move is too high or already taken.") except: print("Invalid move! - wrong input.")

Example testing

  • X = Human Player
  • O = AI (Computer)

Items.Title: 让具有外部配色方案的 vim 编辑器填充 Mac 中的终端窗口 | Let vim editor with external colorschemes fill terminal window in Mac
Items.Description:
迪林

发表于 3 月 11 日

一些在 vim 中安装了外部配色方案的 mac 用户可能会出现这个问题：“vim 编辑器没有填满终端的整个屏幕”（打开 vim 后在示例图像中产生蓝色间隙），虽然它不会打扰功能方面，但它仍然看起来有点烦人或不完美。 这篇文章帮你解决这个问题！

在打开 vim 之前：

打开 vim 后：

解决方案

前言

起初我试图找到一个让 vim 填充终端的解决方案，但似乎没有直接的方法可以做到这一点，所以有一个替代解决方案，“当 vim 打开时，让终端背景颜色与 vim 编辑器相同”。 看到这里我很受启发，所以我写了一个bash脚本来实现这一点，下面是代码，确保你的电脑可以执行applescript和bash！

开始吧！

  1. 制作一个与 vim 背景颜色相同的终端配置文件
    1. 您可以使用 mac 中的内置应用程序“Digital Color Meter”来获取 vim 背景颜色的 rgb 值。
    2. 然后选择 Terminal > Preferences ，点击 Profiles，创建一个配置文件，然后点击 Text。你可以看到主题“Background”下的“Color and Effects section”，使用获得的 rgb 值更改颜色。

附加步骤

  1. 为了方便起见，您可以在终端中使用“mv”命令将 bash 文件重命名为“vim”（需要使用“mv”命令强制删除文件名中的文件扩展名）

  2. 然后把文件放到一个空目录下

  3. 将你的目录放在一个合适的地方后，你可以将下面的行添加到“.bash_profile”或“.zprofile”（取决于你使用的默认 shell），记得将 <1> 更改为你的 bash 文件目录的路径是。

现在执行 bash 脚本，看看它是否有效！

附言。 如果您完成了第 5 步，请重新打开您的终端，您只需输入“vim”即可使用 vim 编辑器，问题现在已解决！

附加信息

  • 参数：
    • 您可以在输入命令时在 bash 文件名后面添加参数，这些参数将以完全相同的形式抛给 vim。

例子 ：

 ``` <bash file path> test.txt ```

上面的命令等同于“通过 vim 编辑 text.txt”

原文:

deeeelin

Posted on Mar 11

   

Some mac users with external colorschemes installed in vim may occur this problem : "vim editor didn't fill the whole screen of terminal" (which creates the blue gap in the sample image after opening vim) , although it doesn't bother in the functional aspects, but it still looks a little annoying or imperfect. This article helps you solve this problem !

Before opening vim :

After opening vim :

Solution

Foreword

At first I tried to find a solution to let vim to fill the terminal, but it seems there are no direct way to make this happen ,so there is a alternative solution, "let terminal background color be same as vim editor when vim is open". I get inspried when looking at here, so I wrote a bash script to make this happen, below is the code,make sure your computer can execute applescript and bash !

Let's start!

  1. Make a terminal config file with the same background color as vim
    1. You can use the builtin app "Digital Color Meter" in mac to get the rgb value of the vim background color.
    2. Then choose Terminal > Preferences , click Profiles, create a profile, then click Text.You can see the "Color and Effects section" under a subject "Background", change the color using the obtained rgb value.

2.Copy the below code, remember to change <1> in the quote to step 1.2's terminal profile name, <2> as your vim editor path.

3.Save the below code as a bash file

#!/bin/bash


original=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to return name of current settings of window 1')

osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal"

   set current settings of window 1 to settings set "<1>"

end tell'

<2> $@

osascript \
-e 'tell application "Terminal"' \
-e "set current settings of window 1 to settings set \"$original\"" \
-e 'end tell'

unset original

exit 0

Additional step

  1. For convenience, you can rename your bash file as "vim" using "mv" command in terminal (need to use "mv" command to forcely remove file extension in filename)

  2. Then put the file under a empty directory

  3. After placing your directory in a nice place,you can add the below line to ".bash_profile" or ".zprofile" (depends on which default shell you use ) , remember to change <1> to the path of the directory your bash file is.

Now execute the bash script and see if it works !

ps. If you gone through step 5, reopen your terminal, and you can just type "vim" to use vim editor with the problem solved now !

Additional information

  • Arguments :
    • you can add arguments behind the name of bash file when entering command, these arguements will be thrown to vim in the exact same form.

Example :

```
 <bash file path> test.txt
```

the above command is equivalent to "edit text.txt by vim"

// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT pragma solidity 0.8.18; contract TaskContract { constructor() { } struct Task { uint id; string taskTitle; string taskText; bool isDeleted; } Task[] private tasks; mapping (uint => address) taskToOwner; event AddTask(address recepient,uint taskId); event DeleteTask(uint taskId,bool isDeleted); function addTask(string memory taskText,string memory taskTitle, bool isDeleted) external { uint taskId = tasks.length; tasks.push(Task(taskId,taskTitle, taskText, isDeleted)); taskToOwner[taskId] = msg.sender; emit AddTask(msg.sender,taskId); } function deleteTask(uint taskId) external { require(taskToOwner[taskId] == msg.sender, "You are not the owner of this task"); tasks[taskId].isDeleted = true; emit DeleteTask(taskId,tasks[taskId].isDeleted); } function getMyTask()public view returns(Task[] memory){ Task[] memory myTasks = new Task[](tasks.length); uint counter = 0; for(uint i = 0; i < tasks.length; i++){ if(taskToOwner[i] == msg.sender && tasks[i].isDeleted == false){ myTasks[counter] = tasks[i]; counter++; } } Task[] memory result = new Task[](counter); for(uint i = 0; i < counter; i++){ result[i] = myTasks[i]; } return result; } }
 // SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT pragma solidity 0.8.18; contract TaskContract { constructor() { } struct Task { uint id; string taskTitle; string taskText; bool isDeleted; } Task[] private tasks; mapping (uint => address) taskToOwner; event AddTask(address recepient,uint taskId); event DeleteTask(uint taskId,bool isDeleted);

  • 该代码定义了一个名为 Task 的结构，其中包含四个字段：一个 ID (uint)、一个任务标题（字符串）、一个任务文本（字符串）和一个指示任务是否已被删除的布尔标志 (bool)。

  • 代码声明了一个名为tasks的私有任务数组，用于存储合约创建的所有任务。

  • 该代码定义了一个名为 taskToOwner 的映射，它将任务 ID (uint) 映射到创建任务的用户的地址。

  • 该代码包括两个事件：

    • 该事件包括添加任务的用户地址和新任务的 ID。
    • 该事件包括已删除任务的 ID 和一个指示它已被删除的标志。

  • 代码使用这些结构来定义任务管理系统的数据模型，其中任务由 Task 结构表示，存储在任务数组中，并通过 taskToOwner 映射与其创建者相关联。 这些事件允许跟踪和审计任务的创建和删除。

 function addTask(string memory taskText,string memory taskTitle, bool isDeleted) external { uint taskId = tasks.length; tasks.push(Task(taskId,taskTitle, taskText, isDeleted)); taskToOwner[taskId] = msg.sender; emit AddTask(msg.sender,taskId); } function deleteTask(uint taskId) external { require(taskToOwner[taskId] == msg.sender, "You are not the owner of this task"); tasks[taskId].isDeleted = true; emit DeleteTask(taskId,tasks[taskId].isDeleted); }

  • 它用于将新任务添加到tasks数组，并通过taskToOwner映射将新任务与调用者的地址相关联。

  • 在该函数中，新任务的 ID 设置为tasks数组的长度。 使用Task结构构造函数创建具有给定文本、标题和删除标志的新任务，并将其添加到tasks数组中。

  • 然后调用者的地址与taskToOwner映射中的新任务 ID 相关联。

  • 最后，将发出带有调用者地址和新任务 ID 的AddTask事件。

  • 它用于在tasks数组中将任务标记为已删除。

  • 在该函数中，将根据与taskToOwner映射中给定任务 ID 关联的地址检查调用者的地址，以确保调用者是任务的所有者。

  • 如果调用者是任务的所有者，则tasks数组中任务的isDeleted标志设置为true 。

  • 最后，将发出一个DeleteTask事件，其中包含已删除任务的 ID 和一个表明它已被标记为已删除的标志。

 function getMyTask()public view returns(Task[] memory){ Task[] memory myTasks = new Task[](tasks.length); uint counter = 0; for(uint i = 0; i < tasks.length; i++){ if(taskToOwner[i] == msg.sender && tasks[i].isDeleted == false){ myTasks[counter] = tasks[i]; counter++; } } Task[] memory result = new Task[](counter); for(uint i = 0; i < counter; i++){ result[i] = myTasks[i]; } return result; }

  • 它用于检索tasks数组中与调用者地址关联的所有未删除任务。

  • 在该函数中，创建了一个名为myTasks的新Task数组，其长度与tasks数组相同。 计数器变量也被初始化为 0。

  • 如果任务与taskToOwner映射中的调用者地址相关联并且未标记为已删除，则将其添加到myTasks数组中counter变量指示的当前索引处，并且counter变量递增。

  • 在第一个 for 循环之后，将创建一个名为result的新Task数组，其长度等于counter变量。

  • 第二个 for 循环用于迭代myTasks数组并使用非空Task对象填充result数组。

  • 最后， result数组作为getMyTask函数的结果返回。

pragma solidity 0.8.18; contract TaskContract { constructor() { }
struct Task { uint id; string taskTitle; string taskText; bool isDeleted; } Task[] private tasks; mapping (uint => address) taskToOwner; event AddTask(address recepient,uint taskId); event DeleteTask(uint taskId,bool isDeleted);

  • The code defines a struct called Task with four fields: an ID (uint), a task title (string), a task text (string), and a Boolean flag indicating whether the task has been deleted (bool).

  • The code declares a private Task array called tasks to store all the tasks created by the contract.

  • The code defines a mapping called taskToOwner, which maps a task ID (uint) to the address of the user who created the task.

  • The code includes two events:

    • AddTask: emitted when a new task is added to the tasks array. The event includes the address of the user who added the task and the ID of the new task.
    • DeleteTask: emitted when a task is marked as deleted in the tasks array. The event includes the ID of the deleted task and a flag indicating that it has been deleted.

  • The code uses these constructs to define the data model for a task management system, where tasks are represented by the Task struct, stored in the tasks array, and associated with their creators via the taskToOwner mapping. The events allow for tracking and auditing of task creation and deletion.

 function addTask(string memory taskText,string memory taskTitle, bool isDeleted) external { uint taskId = tasks.length; tasks.push(Task(taskId,taskTitle, taskText, isDeleted)); taskToOwner[taskId] = msg.sender; emit AddTask(msg.sender,taskId); } function deleteTask(uint taskId) external { require(taskToOwner[taskId] == msg.sender, "You are not the owner of this task"); tasks[taskId].isDeleted = true; emit DeleteTask(taskId,tasks[taskId].isDeleted); }

  • The addTask function is a public function that takes three arguments: a string for the task text, a string for the task title, and a boolean indicating whether the task is marked as deleted. It is used to add new tasks to the tasks array and associate the new task with the caller's address via the taskToOwner mapping.

  • Within the function, the ID for the new task is set to the length of the tasks array. A new task with the given text, title, and deletion flag is created using the Task struct constructor and added to the tasks array.

  • The caller's address is then associated with the new task ID in the taskToOwner mapping.

  • Finally, an AddTask event is emitted with the caller's address and the ID of the new task.

  • The deleteTask function is a public function that takes one argument: the ID of the task to be deleted. It is used to mark a task as deleted in the tasks array.

  • Within the function, the caller's address is checked against the address associated with the given task ID in the taskToOwner mapping to ensure that the caller is the owner of the task.

  • If the caller is the owner of the task, the isDeleted flag for the task is set to true in the tasks array.

  • Finally, a DeleteTask event is emitted with the ID of the deleted task and a flag indicating that it has been marked as deleted.

function getMyTask()public view returns(Task[] memory){ Task[] memory myTasks = new Task[](tasks.length); uint counter = 0; for(uint i = 0; i < tasks.length; i++){ if(taskToOwner[i] == msg.sender && tasks[i].isDeleted == false){ myTasks[counter] = tasks[i]; counter++; } } Task[] memory result = new Task[](counter); for(uint i = 0; i < counter; i++){ result[i] = myTasks[i]; } return result; }

  • The getMyTask function is a public function that returns an array of Task struct objects for the caller. It is used to retrieve all non-deleted tasks associated with the caller's address in the tasks array.

  • Within the function, a new Task array called myTasks is created with the same length as the tasks array. A counter variable is also initialized to 0.

  • A for loop is used to iterate over all tasks in the tasks array. If a task is associated with the caller's address in the taskToOwner mapping and is not marked as deleted, it is added to the myTasks array at the current index indicated by the counter variable, and the counter variable is incremented.

  • After the first for loop, a new Task array called result is created with a length equal to the counter variable.

  • A second for loop is used to iterate over the myTasks array and populate the result array with the non-null Task objects.

  • Finally, the result array is returned as the result of the getMyTask function.

Items.Description:
开发阿南德

发表于 3 月 11 日

您是否有兴趣用 Python 创建一个有趣的互动游戏？ 如果是这样，让我们​​开始构建 Hangman 游戏吧！

关于刽​​子手

玩家的猜测次数有限，每猜错一次，就会抽出一个吊人的一部分。

  • 游戏一直持续到玩家猜对单词或吊人被完全画出为止，在这种情况下游戏失败。

    • 保持冷静编码开始....

    谜题提示和答案

    此代码为 Hangman 游戏设置拼图答案和提示，稍后将在游戏中使用它来生成拼图并向用户提供提示。

     from getpass import getpass import math, random string = getpass("\nProvide Puzzle Answer (Player 1) : ").strip().replace(" ", "").casefold() hint = input('Any Hint : ')

    随机和自定义拼图设计

    您可以在代码中表达为 Hangman 游戏创建拼图的两种方式

    • 通过为用户提供为游戏输入他们自己的单词的选项

    • 或者让游戏为他们随机选择一个词。

    随机拼图设计

    def auto_puzzle(puzzle, missing_words = ""): for i in range((len(puzzle)//2)): random_value = puzzle[math.floor(random.random()*len(puzzle))] if random_value not in missing_words: missing_words += random_value for a in range(len(puzzle)): if puzzle[a] in missing_words: puzzle = puzzle.replace(puzzle[a],'_') return puzzle, missing_words

    自定义拼图设计

    此功能允许用户手动选择要在拼图中删除的字符，并returns更新后的拼图和缺失的单词以用于 Hangman 游戏。

     def custom_puzzle(puzzle, missing_words = ""): num_blanks = int(input('How many blanks you prefer? : ')) while len(missing_words) < num_blanks: blank_char = input('which character you want to blanked : ') if blank_char in puzzle: puzzle = puzzle.replace(blank_char,'_') missing_words += blank_char print(puzzle) else: print('Element not exist in Puzzle') return puzzle, missing_words

    验证猜测

    此功能允许用户对拼图中缺失的字符进行猜测，并显示更新后的拼图字符串和正确的猜测。

     def check_for_guess(puzzle, string, missing_words): false_attempt = 0 while false_attempt < len(missing_words): if puzzle == string.lower(): break ask = 'Remain Attempt : {} | Guess a Word (unique) : '.format(len(missing_words)-(false_attempt)) guess = input(ask).casefold() if guess in missing_words and len(guess) == 1: for a in range(len(puzzle)): if string[a].lower() == guess: puzzle = puzzle[:a] + guess + puzzle[a+1:] print('Keep it on ',puzzle) else: false_attempt += 1 print('Oops! Try again') return puzzle

    了解驱动程序代码

    它根据用户输入为游戏创建一个谜题。 该代码首先将变量puzzle设置为等于表示拼图答案的输入string 。

     puzzle = string if len(string) < 6: print('Answer should be > 6 characters') else: false_attempt = 0 puzzle_type = input('\nDo you want system designed puzzle? y/n : ') puzzle, missing_words = auto_puzzle(puzzle) if puzzle_type == 'y' or puzzle_type == 'Y' else custom_puzzle(puzzle) print('\n\nYour Puzzle (Player 2):',puzzle) print('Given hint: ',hint) given_answer = check_for_guess(puzzle, string, missing_words) print('\nCongratulation you won, Player 1 lost!') if given_answer == string.lower() else print('\nYou lost, Player 1 Won')

    让我们玩得开心

    原文:

    Dev Anand

    Posted on Mar 11

       

    Are you interested in creating a fun and interactive game in Python? If so, let's dive into building a Hangman game!

    About Hangman

    Hangman is a word guessing game where one player thinks of a word and the other player(s) try to guess it by suggesting letters.

    • The player(s) have a limited number of guesses and for each incorrect guess, a part of a hanging man is drawn.

    • The game continues until the player(s) either guess the word correctly or the hanging man is fully drawn, in which case the game is lost.

    Keep calm coding begins....

    Hangman in Python

    Puzzle hint and answer

    This code sets up the puzzle answer and hint for the Hangman game, which will be used later in the game to generate the puzzle and provide hints to the user.

    from getpass import getpass
import math, random string = getpass("\nProvide Puzzle Answer (Player 1) : ").strip().replace(" ", "").casefold()
hint = input('Any Hint : ')

    Random and Custom Puzzle design

    You can express the two ways of creating a puzzle for the Hangman game in your code

    • by providing the user with the option to either input their own word for the game

    • or have the game randomly select a word for them.

    Random puzzle design 

    def auto_puzzle(puzzle, missing_words = ""): for i in range((len(puzzle)//2)): random_value = puzzle[math.floor(random.random()*len(puzzle))] if random_value not in missing_words: missing_words += random_value for a in range(len(puzzle)): if puzzle[a] in missing_words: puzzle = puzzle.replace(puzzle[a],'_') return puzzle, missing_words

    Custom puzzle design

    This function allows the user to manually select characters to be blanked out in the puzzle, and returns the updated puzzle and missing words to be used in the Hangman game.

    def custom_puzzle(puzzle, missing_words = ""): num_blanks = int(input('How many blanks you prefer? : ')) while len(missing_words) < num_blanks: blank_char = input('which character you want to blanked : ') if blank_char in puzzle: puzzle = puzzle.replace(blank_char,'_') missing_words += blank_char print(puzzle) else: print('Element not exist in Puzzle') return puzzle, missing_words

    Validating Guesses

    This function allows the user to make guesses for the missing characters in the puzzle and displays the updated puzzle string with correct guesses.

    def check_for_guess(puzzle, string, missing_words): false_attempt = 0 while false_attempt < len(missing_words): if puzzle == string.lower(): break ask = 'Remain Attempt : {} | Guess a Word (unique) : '.format(len(missing_words)-(false_attempt)) guess = input(ask).casefold() if guess in missing_words and len(guess) == 1: for a in range(len(puzzle)): if string[a].lower() == guess: puzzle = puzzle[:a] + guess + puzzle[a+1:] print('Keep it on ',puzzle) else: false_attempt += 1 print('Oops! Try again') return puzzle

    Understanding the driver code

    It creates a puzzle for the game based on user input. The code first sets the variable puzzle equal to the input string that represents the answer to the puzzle.

    puzzle = string
if len(string) < 6: print('Answer should be > 6 characters')
else: false_attempt = 0 puzzle_type = input('\nDo you want system designed puzzle? y/n : ') puzzle, missing_words = auto_puzzle(puzzle) if puzzle_type == 'y' or puzzle_type == 'Y' else custom_puzzle(puzzle) print('\n\nYour Puzzle (Player 2):',puzzle) print('Given hint: ',hint) given_answer = check_for_guess(puzzle, string, missing_words) print('\nCongratulation you won, Player 1 lost!') if given_answer == string.lower() else print('\nYou lost, Player 1 Won')

    Let's play for fun

幸运的是，有几个可用的免费托管平台可以使网络托管更易于访问和用户友好。

以下是您可以使用的一些最佳免费托管平台：

它支持静态站点生成器 Jekyll，并提供自定义域、HTTPS 加密等功能，让您的网站看起来更专业。

它提供了用户友好的界面、持续部署、自定义域、HTTPS 加密和其他功能，使您的网站快速且安全。

它提供了用户友好的界面、易于部署、实时数据库、身份验证、托管和其他功能，使您的网站具有吸引力和互动性。

它提供了一个用户友好的界面、自定义域、HTTPS 加密、无服务器功能和其他功能，使您的网站快速和安全。 此外，Vercel 拥有全球边缘网络，可确保您网站的快速可靠性能。

它提供无限存储和带宽、自定义域和其他功能，使您的网站易于访问和快速访问。

这些免费托管平台提供了一种很好的方式来开始使用网络托管，而无需花很多钱。 它们对用户友好，并提供许多您期望付费托管服务提供商提供的功能。 但是，请务必注意，免费托管平台可能对存储、带宽和其他资源有限制，因此最好仔细阅读条款和条件。

总之，免费托管平台是使网络托管更易于访问和用户友好的好方法。 在这些平台的帮助下，初学者和小型企业可以快速轻松地开始使用网络托管。 因此，如果您正在寻找免费的托管平台，请查看 GitHub Pages、Netlify、Vercel、Firebase 和 InfinityFree 以找到最适合您需求的平台。



原文:

Web hosting is a crucial part of building a website, but it can be costly for beginners and small businesses. Fortunately, there are several free hosting platforms available that make web hosting more accessible and user-friendly.

Here are some of the best free hosting platforms that you can use:

1. GitHub Pages

GitHub Pages is a free web hosting platform that allows you to host static websites directly from your GitHub repository. It supports Jekyll, a static site generator, and provides custom domains, HTTPS encryption, and other features to make your website look professional.

2. Netlify

Netlify is another free web hosting platform that supports static websites, but it also allows you to deploy and host dynamic websites with serverless functions. It provides a user-friendly interface, continuous deployment, custom domains, HTTPS encryption, and other features to make your website fast and secure.

3. Firebase

Firebase is a free cloud platform that supports dynamic websites built with popular programming languages such as JavaScript, Java, and Swift. It provides a user-friendly interface, easy deployment, real-time database, authentication, hosting, and other features to make your website engaging and interactive.

4. Vercel

Vercel is a free cloud platform for building and deploying web applications, which supports both static and dynamic websites built with popular frameworks such as Next.js, Gatsby, and React. It provides a user-friendly interface, custom domains, HTTPS encryption, serverless functions, and other features to make your website fast and secure. Additionally, Vercel has a global edge network that ensures fast and reliable performance for your website.

5. InfinityFree

InfinityFree is a free web hosting platform that supports dynamic websites built with popular programming languages such as PHP and MySQL. It provides unlimited storage and bandwidth, custom domains, and other features to make your website accessible and fast.

These free hosting platforms offer a great way to get started with web hosting without breaking the bank. They are user-friendly and provide many features that you would expect from a paid hosting provider. However, it's important to note that free hosting platforms may have limitations on storage, bandwidth, and other resources, so it's always a good idea to read the terms and conditions carefully.

In conclusion, free hosting platforms are a great way to make web hosting more accessible and user-friendly. With the help of these platforms, beginners and small businesses can get started with web hosting quickly and easily. So, if you're looking for a free hosting platform, check out GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, Firebase, and InfinityFree to find the one that best fits your needs.

Items.Title: JWT认证授权详解 | A Detailed Introduction to JWT Authentication and Authorization
Items.Description:
贾迪普帕蒂尔

发表于 3 月 11 日

我们将讨论使用 JWT 令牌和不同的加密算法和技术的身份验证和授权。 因此，我们将一一查看以下内容。

为什么选择智威汤逊令牌
  • 使用 JWT 令牌的客户端-服务器场景
  • 使用 JWT 刷新令牌的客户端-服务器场景

    • 让我们从基础知识和实时场景一一开始。

    基本上，JWT 用于不同用户的身份验证和授权。

    验证

    • 在这个过程中，我们将用户名和密码发送给认证服务器。
    • 身份验证服务器将验证这些凭据并将它们存储在浏览器会话和 Cookie 的某个位置，并将 ID 发送给最终用户。

    授权

    • 在授权中，我们检查用户输入的任何凭据，而身份验证过程和同一用户将使用我们存储在身份验证过程中的凭据授予对资源的访问权限，然后授权该特定用户。

    所以，这通常都是关于身份验证和授权的。

    版权所有。
  • 基本上，HMAC 代表基于散列的消息身份验证代码，它使用一些很棒的加密散列技术，为我们提供了极大的安全性。
  • 此外，JWT 是伟大的身份验证和授权框架（如 OAuth 和 OpenID）的一部分，它们将提供一种安全传输数据的良好机制。

    • 为什么选择智威汤逊令牌

    • 用户将使用 JWT 令牌进行身份验证，它是带有发行者颁发的密钥的数字签名。 因此，这将用于安全地对用户进行身份验证，还可以管理声明等等。
    • 而不是将信息用户凭据存储在服务器上的某个位置，攻击者可以通过互联网轻松获取这些信息。 因此，我们使用 JWT，并使用它使用不同的加密算法维护用户机密，并将其编码以对用户进行身份验证。
    • 这就是为什么许多 Web 应用程序使用 JWT 来安全地对用户进行身份验证

    基本上，JSON Web Token 由三部分组成，用于将用户信息存储在由点（.）

    例如 -

    正如您在上图中看到的，它是一个编码的 Base64 URL，分三部分存储用户机密和信息。

    标头存储有关 JWT 令牌的信息，例如令牌的类型以及我们用于创建它的任何算法。

    例如 -

    { "alg": "HS256", "typ": "JWT" }
    有效负载是 JWT 令牌的第二部分，用于存储有关用户的信息，如声明、角色、主题以及与用户相关的一些附加信息。

    例如-

    { "sub": "1234567890", "name": "Jaydeep Patil", "admin": "true"

    签名用于检查标头和有效负载中存在的用户信息，并使用 base64 编码字符串中存在的密钥和数据验证内容。 基本上，密钥存在于服务器上，我们在创建令牌时使用它。 该密钥可防止外部攻击者破解令牌。 因此，在此过程中，将创建一个 Base64 编码的字符串，用于身份验证和授权。

    HMACSHA256( base64UrlEncode(header) + "." + base64UrlEncode(payload),//This is the Secret Key which is store at server side and use in signature

    你的 256 位秘密）

    因此，这些是 Base64Url 字符串中存在的令牌的三个部分，由点分隔并存储用户的秘密信息以验证用户。

    使用 JWT 令牌的客户端-服务器场景

    您可以在下图中看到当用户想要从后端服务器访问资源时，身份验证过程如何为用户工作。

    • 首先，用户使用用户名和密码等凭据向身份验证服务器发送请求。
    • 然后，身份验证服务器将验证该信息以及用户提供的任何正确并成功进行身份验证的信息，然后身份验证服务器将向用户颁发 JWT 有效访问令牌。
    • 接下来，用户使用有效的 JWT 访问令牌向后端服务器发送第一个请求，服务器将向用户提供请求的资源。
    • 稍后，如果用户想从后端服务器访问另一个服务，那么他将向服务器发送第二个请求。
    • 现在，正如您在图中看到的那样，当用户向服务器发送第二个请求以访问受保护的资源时，但此时令牌已过期，因此服务器会响应最终用户。
    • 最后，正如您在图表的最后一部分看到的那样，用户再次需要登录并将用户凭据发送到身份验证服务器以获取新的 JWT 有效访问令牌并将其存储在本地存储中客户端的某个位置等等就像 Base64Url 编码的 URL 中那样。
    • 因此，通过这种方式，正常的身份验证过程将起作用。

    使用 JWT 刷新令牌的客户端-服务器场景

    • 您可以在下图中看到 JWT 刷新令牌将如何逐步工作。
    • 首先，用户将使用用户名和密码等凭据将请求发送到身份验证服务器。
    • 接下来，身份验证服务器验证用户信息和凭证是否正确，然后服务器将提供 JWT 有效访问令牌和刷新令牌。 然后，用户将该令牌存储在客户端本地存储中的某个位置，并根据需要和要求存储类似的东西。
    • 稍后，用户将第一个请求发送到后端服务器以访问标头中带有 JWT 有效访问令牌的受保护资源。
    • 接下来，后端服务器检查用户的角色和权限，如登录用户被授权获取受保护的资源，这将是有效和适当的，然后后端服务器将请求的受保护资源提供给最终用户。

    • 与此同时，用户向后端服务器发送第二个请求以访问另一项服务，如果同时 JWT 有效访问令牌已过期，在这种情况下，服务器将响应最终用户，如上图所示。
    • 在这种情况下，当 JWT 有效访问令牌过期时，用户会使用刷新令牌向 Auth Server 发送身份验证请求以获取新的 JWT 访问令牌。
    • 接下来，服务器将验证用户信息并向最终用户提供带有刷新令牌的新访问令牌，刷新令牌比简单 JWT 有效访问令牌具有更长的生命周期
    • 因此，在浏览 Web 应用程序并通过 Internet 访问新服务和资源时，将连续执行上述所有步骤。

    所以，这都是关于 JWT 令牌以及身份验证和授权过程中的工作方式的。

    我希望您了解与 JWT 相关的所有内容，并且现在对它有一个基本的了解。

    原文:

    Jaydeep Patil

    Posted on Mar 11

       

    We will discuss authentication and authorization using the JWT token and different cryptographic algorithms and techniques. So, we will be looking at the following things one by one.

    Introduction of JWT Token

    • Why JWT Token
    • Structure of JWT Token
    • Client-Server Scenario with JWT Token
    • Client-Server Scenario with JWT Refresh Token

    Let’s start one by one with the basics and real-time scenarios.

    Basically, JWT is used for the authentication and authorization of different users.

    Authentication

    • In this process, we send the username and password to the authentication server.
    • Authentication Server will validate those credentials and store them somewhere on the browser Session and Cookies and Send the ID to the end-user.

    Authorization

    • In, the Authorization we check whatever credential entered by the user while the Authentication process and that same user will have granted access to the resource using the credential which we store in the Authentication Process and then Authorize that particular user.

    So, this is all about authentication and authorization, normally.

    Introduction of JWT Token

    • JSON Web Token is the Open Standard (RFC 7519) Self-Contained way that will be used to transmit the data securely over the different environments as a JSON Object.
    • RFC (Request for Comment) is the shortened form of Remote Function Call and Formal Document from the Internet Engineering Task Force. RFC 7519 JSON Web Token (JWT) May 2015 Copyright Notice Copyright © 2015 IETF Trust and the persons identified as the document authors. All rights reserved.
    • JWT is the trusted way of authentication because it is digitally signed and secret using HMAC Algorithm or sometimes using a public/private key using RSA.
    • Basically, HMAC stands for Hashed-based Message Authentication Code, it uses some great cryptographic hashing technique that provides us great security.
    • Also, the JWT is part of great Authentication and Authorization Framework like OAuth and OpenID which will provide a great mechanism to transfer data securely.

    Why JWT Token

    • The User will Authenticate using JWT Token and It is a digitally signed signature with a secret key issued by the issuer. So that will use to Authenticate the User Securely and Also, manage the claims, and many more.
    • Instead of storing information User Credentials somewhere on the Server that will get easily by attackers over the internet. So, we use JWT, and using that we maintain user secrets with different Cryptographic Algorithms and Encoded that to Authenticate Users.
    • That’s why many web applications use JWT for authentication of users securely

    Structure of JWT Token

    Basically, The JSON Web Token consists of three parts which are used to store user information in the Token separated by dots(.)

    For example –

    As you see in the above diagram, it is an encoded Base64 URL that stores user secrets and information in three parts.

    1. Header

    The header stores information about the JWT token, like the type of token and whatever algorithm we used to create it.

    For Example –

    { "alg": "HS256", "typ": "JWT" }
    2. Payload

    Payload is the second part of the JWT token, which is used to store information about users like claims, roles, subjects, and some additional information related to a user.

    For Example-

    { "sub": "1234567890", "name": "Jaydeep Patil", "admin": "true"

    }

    3. Signature

    Signature is used to check user information that is present in the header and payload and validate things with the secret key and data that is present in the base64-encoded string. Basically, the secret key is present on the server, which we use while creating the token. That secret key prevents external attackers from cracking the token. So, in this process, a Base64-encoded string is created to be used for authentication and authorization.

    HMACSHA256( base64UrlEncode(header) + "." + base64UrlEncode(payload),//This is the Secret Key which is store at server side and use in signature

    your-256-bit-secret)

    So, these are the three parts of the token that are present in the Base64Url string, which is separated by a dot and stores secret information of the user for validating users.

    Client-Server Scenario with JWT Token

    You can see in the following diagram how the authentication process works for the user when he wants to access the resources from the backend server.

    • First, the user sends a request to the Authentication Server with credentials like User Name and Password.
    • Then, the Authentication server will validate that information and whatever information is provided by the user that will be correct and successfully authenticate then Auth Server will issue the JWT Valid Access Token to the user.
    • Next, The User Sends the first request to the backend server with a Valid JWT Access Token and the Server will provide the requested resource to the user.
    • Later on, if the user wants to access another service from the backend server then he will send a second request to the server.
    • Now, as you see in the diagram when the user sends the second request to the server to access the protected resource but at that time the token is expired so the server responds to the end-user.
    • Finally, as you see in the last part of the diagram user again needs to be login and send the user credential to the authentication server to get a new JWT Valid Access Token and store it somewhere on the client-side in the Local Storage and something like that in the Base64Url Encoded URL.
    • So, this way the normal authentication process will work.

    Client-Server Scenario with JWT Refresh Token

    • You can see in the following diagram how the JWT Refresh Token will work step-by-step.
    • First, the user will send the request to the Authentication Server with credentials like User Name and Password.
    • Next, the Authentication Server validates the user information and credentials that will be correct then the server will provide the JWT Valid Access Token and Refresh Token. Then, the user will store that token somewhere on the client-side in the Local Storage and something like that as per need and requirement.
    • Later on, the user sends the first request to the backend server to access the protected resources with JWT Valid Access Token in the header.
    • Next, the backend server checks the roles and permission of the user like the login user is authorized to get the protected resources and that will valid and proper then the backend server provides the requested protected resource to the end-user.

    • In the meantime, the user sends the second request to the backend server to access another service and if meanwhile the JWT Valid Access Token is expired in that case the server will respond to the end-user as you see above image.
    • In that case, when the JWT Valid Access Token is expired then the user sends the authentication request to the Auth Server with Refresh Token to get a new JWT Access Token.
    • Next, the server will validate the user information and provide a new access token with a refresh token to the end-user and the refresh token have more life than the Simple JWT Valid Access Token
    • So, all the above steps are executed continuously while navigating the web application and accessing the new services and resources over the internet.

    So, this is all about the JWT token and how things are going to work during the authentication and authorization process.

    I hope you understand all things related to JWT and now have a basic idea about it.

    Happy coding!

Items.Title: 了解币安克隆脚本的概念： | Understanding The Concept Of Binance Clone Script:
Items.Description:
近年来，加密货币背后的创新技术给人们留下了深刻的印象，它们彻底改变我们对货币和金融的看法的潜力吸引了许多人的想象力。 一些企业家希望推出他们的加密货币交易平台，例如 Binance。 因为 Binance 是最受欢迎和高度安全的加密货币交易平台之一，用于买卖加密货币。

近年来，几家公司试图通过创建自己的加密货币交易所来复制 Binance 的平台。 然而，从头开始构建加密货币交易所是一项艰巨的任务。 这就是币安克隆脚本的概念发挥作用的地方。

币安 - 概述：

它提供对 600 多种加密货币的访问，包括比特币、以太币、莱特币等。与其他加密货币交易所相比，Binance 的主要特点之一是交易费用低。 持有币安原生加密货币币安币（BNB）的用户，可以通过使用BNB支付手续费，进一步降低交易手续费。 它有自己的区块链，称为币安链

关于币安克隆脚本：

这个 Binance 克隆脚本包含启动像 Binance 这样的交易平台所需的所有特性和功能。 它为企业家节省了从头开始开发加密货币交易所所需的时间和金钱。

币安克隆脚本的特点：

Items.Title: [AWS S3] 使用分段上传功能上传大文件 | [AWS S3] Upload large file with Multipart Upload feature
Items.Description:
龙娥

发表于 3 月 11 日

它允许用户从网络上的任何地方存储和检索数据。 它在上传非常大的文件时特别有用。 使用分段上传，您可以并行上传对象的各个部分，这可以显着加快整个上传过程。

提供访问权限并创建 S3 存储桶
首先，我们需要为 IDE 提供对 AWS 的访问，我们将在其中实现此示例。 所以，如果你还是不知道，你可以参考我之前的帖子，在 2.1 部分。

接下来，我们创建一个 S3 存储桶来存储一些文件。 我将我的存储桶命名为 multipart-uploading0924。 你需要为你的名字命名一个不同的名字。 因为 S3 bucket name 是全局唯一的。

设置 Spring Boot 项目在这个演示中，我们将创建一个可以将文件上传到 S3 存储桶的 API。 您可以使用 Eclipse 中的 Spring Start Project 或 Spring Initializer 来创建 Spring Boot 项目。 之后，我们需要将此依赖项添加到 POM 文件中。

 <dependency> <groupId>com.amazonaws</groupId> <artifactId>aws-java-sdk-s3</artifactId> <version>1.12.424</version> </dependency>

创建用于上传文件的 API 端点
我想向您展示使用 S3 的分段上传功能时更好的性能。 所以我们将创建 2 个函数，一个用于正常上传，另一个用于分段上传。

首先，创建一个将与创建的存储桶交互的 S3 客户端。 您必须更改已设置的配置文件的名称，以及在下面的代码中放置存储桶的区域。 在这种情况下， longngo0924是我将用于创建 S3 客户端的配置文件，我的存储桶位于ap-southeast-2区域（悉尼）

 private AmazonS3 getS3ClientInstance() { if (s3client != null) return s3client; return AmazonS3ClientBuilder.standard().withCredentials(new ProfileCredentialsProvider("longngo0924")) .withRegion(Regions.AP_SOUTHEAST_2).build(); }

我们在服务层创建一个名为uploadFileV1的函数。 这个函数对应的是普通上传类型，我们写了一些这样的代码。

 public Map<String, String> uploadFileV1(MultipartFile multipartFile) throws IllegalStateException, IOException { Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>(); s3client = getS3ClientInstance(); File file = convertToFile(multipartFile); PutObjectRequest putObjectRequest = new PutObjectRequest(bucketName, file.getName(), file); long start = System.currentTimeMillis(); PutObjectResult result = s3client.putObject(putObjectRequest); long end = System.currentTimeMillis(); log.info("Complete Normal Uploading {}s", (end - start) / 1000); if (result != null) { map.put("fileSize", String.valueOf(multipartFile.getSize() / 1000000) + "MB"); map.put("time", String.valueOf((end - start) / 1000) + "s"); } else { map.put("message", "Upload Failed"); } return map; }

在上面的函数中，我们从控制器层接收到一个多部分文件。 然后，我们将其转换为文件并构造一个对 S3 的 put 对象请求调用。

第二个函数将被命名为uploadFileV2 。 这个功能和第一个类似。 不同之处在于我们将与多阈值并行上传文件，每个阈值上传我们文件的一部分。 和这样的实现代码。

 public Map<String, String> uploadFileV2(MultipartFile multipartFile) throws IOException, AmazonServiceException, AmazonClientException, InterruptedException { Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>(); s3client = getS3ClientInstance(); File file = convertToFile(multipartFile); TransferManager tm = TransferManagerBuilder.standard().withS3Client(s3client) .withMultipartUploadThreshold((long) (50 * 1024 * 1025)).build(); long start = System.currentTimeMillis(); Upload result = tm.upload(bucketName, file.getName(), file); result.waitForCompletion(); long end = System.currentTimeMillis(); log.info("Complete Multipart Uploading {}s", (end - start) / 1000); map.put("fileSize", String.valueOf(multipartFile.getSize() / 1000000) + "MB"); map.put("time", String.valueOf((end - start) / 1000) + "s"); return map; }

您可以看到我们的文件被切割成大小为 50 MB 的片段。 这里有一点， TransferManager的上传方法是非阻塞的，立即返回。 因此，如果需要，我们需要使用waitForCompletion方法来等待响应。

最后，我们在控制器层添加一些端点来接收上传请求。

 @PostMapping("/v1/uploading") public Map<String, String> uploadFileV1(@RequestParam MultipartFile file) throws IllegalStateException, IOException { return uploadFileService.uploadFileV1(file); } @PostMapping("/v2/uploading") public Map<String, String> uploadFileV2(@RequestParam MultipartFile file) throws IllegalStateException, IOException, AmazonServiceException, AmazonClientException, InterruptedException { return uploadFileService.uploadFileV2(file); }

将文件上传到 S3 存储桶
出于测试目的，我们使用 Postman 来测试已实现的 API。 首先，我们将使用正常上传功能对应的端点并上传一个 200 MB 大小的文件

现在，我们测试分段上传的端点

我们可以看到，对于同样的 200 MB 文件，分段上传功能比普通上传功能具有更好的性能。 在这个例子中速度是原来的两倍。 还有我们已经通过 API 上传的文件。

三、总结

使用 S3 分段上传功能，上传过程将有更好的性能，这个好处对于需要定期上传大文件的应用程序来说非常重要。 此外，如果上传的任何部分失败，您只需重新上传该特定部分而不是整个对象。 这可以节省时间和带宽。

原文:

Long Ngo

Posted on Mar 11

AWS S3 (Simple Storage Service) is an object storage service. It allows users to store and retrieve data from anywhere on the web. S3 is designed for businesses of all sizes and can store a virtually unlimited number of objects, including photos, videos, log files, backups, and other types of data.

S3 multipart upload is a feature that allows you to upload large objects in parts (i.e., chunks) instead of uploading the entire object in a single HTTP request. It is particularly useful when uploading very large files. With multipart upload, you can upload individual parts of the object in parallel, which can significantly speed up the overall upload process.

2. Implementation

2.1. Provide access and create S3 bucket
First, we need to provide access to AWS for the IDE, where we are implementing this example. So, if you don't know anyway, you can refer to my previous post, in the 2.1 section.

Next, we create a S3 bucket to store some files. I will name my bucket is multipart-uploading0924. You need named a difference name for your one. Because the S3 bucket name is unique in global.

2.2. Setup Spring boot project In this demo, we will create an API that can upload files to S3 bucket. You can use the Spring Start Project in Eclipse or Spring Initializer to create a Spring Boot project. After that, we need to add this dependency to POM file.

<dependency>
    <groupId>com.amazonaws</groupId>
    <artifactId>aws-java-sdk-s3</artifactId>
    <version>1.12.424</version>
</dependency>

2.3. Create API endpoints using to upload file
I want to show you the better performance when using multipart upload feature of S3. So we will create 2 function, one for normal uploading and another for multipart uploading.

First, creating a S3 client that will interact with created bucket. You must change the name of the profile you already set up, and the region where you place the bucket in below code. In this case, longngo0924 is a profile that I will use to create S3 client and my bucket is placed in ap-southeast-2 region (Sydney)

private AmazonS3 getS3ClientInstance() {
        if (s3client != null)
            return s3client;
        return AmazonS3ClientBuilder.standard().withCredentials(new ProfileCredentialsProvider("longngo0924"))
                .withRegion(Regions.AP_SOUTHEAST_2).build();
    }

We create a function in service layer with the name is uploadFileV1. This function corresponding for normal upload type, and we write some code like this.

public Map<String, String> uploadFileV1(MultipartFile multipartFile) throws IllegalStateException, IOException {

        Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>();

        s3client = getS3ClientInstance();

        File file = convertToFile(multipartFile);

        PutObjectRequest putObjectRequest = new PutObjectRequest(bucketName, file.getName(), file);

        long start = System.currentTimeMillis();

        PutObjectResult result = s3client.putObject(putObjectRequest);

        long end = System.currentTimeMillis();
        log.info("Complete Normal Uploading {}s", (end - start) / 1000);

        if (result != null) {
            map.put("fileSize", String.valueOf(multipartFile.getSize() / 1000000) + "MB");
            map.put("time", String.valueOf((end - start) / 1000) + "s");
        } else {
            map.put("message", "Upload Failed");

        }
        return map;
    }

In the above function, we receive a multipart file from controller layer. Then, we convert it to file and construct a put object request call to S3.

The second function will be named is uploadFileV2. This function is similar with the first. The difference is we will upload file in parallel with multi thresh, every thresh upload a partial of our file. And the implemented code like this.

public Map<String, String> uploadFileV2(MultipartFile multipartFile)
            throws IOException, AmazonServiceException, AmazonClientException, InterruptedException {
        Map<String, String> map = new HashMap<>();
        s3client = getS3ClientInstance();

        File file = convertToFile(multipartFile);

        TransferManager tm = TransferManagerBuilder.standard().withS3Client(s3client)
                .withMultipartUploadThreshold((long) (50 * 1024 * 1025)).build();

        long start = System.currentTimeMillis();
        Upload result = tm.upload(bucketName, file.getName(), file);
        result.waitForCompletion();
        long end = System.currentTimeMillis();
        log.info("Complete Multipart Uploading {}s", (end - start) / 1000);

        map.put("fileSize", String.valueOf(multipartFile.getSize() / 1000000) + "MB");
        map.put("time", String.valueOf((end - start) / 1000) + "s");

        return map;

    }

You can see our file being cut into piece with size is 50 MB. One point in here, the upload method of TransferManager is non-blocking and returns immediately. So we need to use waitForCompletion method to wait the response if we need.

Finally, we add some endpoints in controller layer to receive uploading request.

@PostMapping("/v1/uploading")
    public Map<String, String> uploadFileV1(@RequestParam MultipartFile file)
            throws IllegalStateException, IOException {

        return uploadFileService.uploadFileV1(file);
    }

    @PostMapping("/v2/uploading")
    public Map<String, String> uploadFileV2(@RequestParam MultipartFile file)
            throws IllegalStateException, IOException,
            AmazonServiceException, AmazonClientException, InterruptedException {

        return uploadFileService.uploadFileV2(file);
    }

2.4. Upload file to S3 bucket
For testing purpose, we use Postman to test implemented APIs. First, we will use the endpoint corresponding for normal upload function and upload a 200 MB size file

And for now, we test the endpoint for multipart upload

We can see with the same 200 MB file, the multipart upload function have the better performance than normal upload function. Speed is twice as fast in this example. And there are files we already uploaded by APIs.

3. Summary

Using S3 Multipart Uploading feature, the upload process will have better performance and this benefit is significant for an application need to upload large file regularly. Additionally, if any part of the upload fails, you only need to re-upload that specific part rather than the entire object. This can save time and bandwidth.

The implementation of all these examples can be found in my GitHub

Happy Coding :)
